name: Square
description: Square API enables payment processing, customer management, catalog operations, order management, invoicing, subscriptions, inventory tracking, loyalty programs, and gift cards.

capabilities.name: payments_create
capabilities.description: Process a payment using a payment source (card nonce, card on file, etc.).

capabilities.name: payments_list
capabilities.description: List payments with optional filtering by date range, status, and location.

capabilities.name: payments_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific payment by ID.

capabilities.name: payments_update
capabilities.description: Update an APPROVED payment before completion.

capabilities.name: payments_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel (void) a specific payment.

capabilities.name: payments_complete
capabilities.description: Complete (capture) a delayed-capture payment.

capabilities.name: refunds_create
capabilities.description: Issue a refund for a completed payment.

capabilities.name: refunds_list
capabilities.description: List refunds with optional date range filtering.

capabilities.name: refunds_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific refund by ID.

capabilities.name: customers_create
capabilities.description: Create a new customer profile with contact information.

capabilities.name: customers_list
capabilities.description: List all customer profiles.

capabilities.name: customers_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific customer profile by ID.

capabilities.name: customers_update
capabilities.description: Update a customer profile.

capabilities.name: customers_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a customer profile.

capabilities.name: customers_search
capabilities.description: Search customer profiles by name, email, phone, or custom filters.

capabilities.name: orders_create
capabilities.description: Create a new order with line items, taxes, and discounts.

capabilities.name: orders_search
capabilities.description: Search orders with filters by location, date range, customer, and state.

capabilities.name: orders_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific order by ID.

capabilities.name: orders_update
capabilities.description: Update an open order (add/remove line items, apply discounts).

capabilities.name: orders_pay
capabilities.description: Pay for an order with one or more payment IDs.

capabilities.name: catalog_list
capabilities.description: List catalog objects (items, variations, categories, taxes, discounts).

capabilities.name: catalog_upsert_object
capabilities.description: Create or update a single catalog object (item, category, tax, discount).

capabilities.name: catalog_get_object
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific catalog object by ID.

capabilities.name: catalog_delete_object
capabilities.description: Delete a catalog object by ID.

capabilities.name: catalog_search
capabilities.description: Search catalog objects by name, attribute values, or custom queries.

capabilities.name: catalog_batch_upsert
capabilities.description: Create or update up to 10,000 catalog objects in a single batch.

capabilities.name: catalog_batch_retrieve
capabilities.description: Retrieve multiple catalog objects by their IDs.

capabilities.name: catalog_batch_delete
capabilities.description: Delete multiple catalog objects by their IDs.

capabilities.name: invoices_create
capabilities.description: Create a draft invoice for an order with payment schedules and delivery method.

capabilities.name: invoices_list
capabilities.description: List invoices for a location.

capabilities.name: invoices_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific invoice by ID.

capabilities.name: invoices_update
capabilities.description: Update a draft invoice.

capabilities.name: invoices_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a draft invoice.

capabilities.name: invoices_publish
capabilities.description: Publish a draft invoice and send it to the customer.

capabilities.name: invoices_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a published invoice.

capabilities.name: invoices_search
capabilities.description: Search invoices by location, customer, or date range.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_create
capabilities.description: Enroll a customer in a subscription plan.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific subscription by ID.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_update
capabilities.description: Update a subscription (change plan, modify fields).

capabilities.name: subscriptions_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel an active subscription.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_search
capabilities.description: Search subscriptions by customer, location, or plan.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_resume
capabilities.description: Resume a paused or deactivated subscription.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_pause
capabilities.description: Pause an active subscription.

capabilities.name: locations_list
capabilities.description: List all business locations.

capabilities.name: locations_create
capabilities.description: Create a new business location.

capabilities.name: locations_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific location by ID.

capabilities.name: locations_update
capabilities.description: Update a location.

capabilities.name: inventory_batch_change
capabilities.description: Adjust or set inventory counts for catalog items across locations.

capabilities.name: inventory_batch_retrieve_counts
capabilities.description: Retrieve current inventory counts for catalog items at locations.

capabilities.name: inventory_get_count
capabilities.description: Retrieve current inventory count for a specific catalog object.

capabilities.name: checkout_create_payment_link
capabilities.description: Create a Square-hosted checkout page (payment link).

capabilities.name: checkout_list_payment_links
capabilities.description: List all payment links.

capabilities.name: checkout_get_payment_link
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific payment link by ID.

capabilities.name: checkout_delete_payment_link
capabilities.description: Delete a payment link.

capabilities.name: loyalty_accounts_create
capabilities.description: Create a loyalty account for a customer.

capabilities.name: loyalty_accounts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific loyalty account.

capabilities.name: loyalty_accounts_search
capabilities.description: Search loyalty accounts by phone number, customer ID, or other criteria.

capabilities.name: loyalty_accounts_adjust
capabilities.description: Add or subtract loyalty points from an account.

capabilities.name: loyalty_program_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the loyalty program configuration.

capabilities.name: gift_cards_create
capabilities.description: Create a digital gift card or register a physical gift card.

capabilities.name: gift_cards_list
capabilities.description: List all gift cards.

capabilities.name: gift_cards_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific gift card by ID.

capabilities.name: gift_cards_link_customer
capabilities.description: Link a customer to a gift card.
